TestCase z17Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_list = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_list, t1.list, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.list = follow_case_list;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Right circular shift: move last element to front
    int last = follow_case.list[follow_case.n - 1];
    for (int i = follow_case.n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        follow_case.list[i] = follow_case.list[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.list[0] = last;
    
    return follow_case;
}
